incidents.what_broke: Listings search timed out for one partner, so their search results didn't load.
incidents.customer_impact: One partner's listings search failed for about a minute; no data was lost.
incidents.how_to_verify_fix: Re-run a listings search for that partner and confirm results return within 3 seconds.

incidents.what_broke: A backend queue filled up and started rejecting new requests for about a minute.
incidents.customer_impact: Some search requests briefly failed during that minute; retries succeeded.
incidents.how_to_verify_fix: Send repeated requests during peak load and confirm none are rejected.

incidents.what_broke: A single listings search request was dropped due to a backend overload condition.
incidents.customer_impact: One partner saw a failed search; a retry would have succeeded.
incidents.how_to_verify_fix: Trigger the same search again and confirm it succeeds without error.
